area_codes.basis: Public FTC/FCC consumer guidance has identified one-ring and callback scam complaint patterns involving some Caribbean NANP area codes.
Public FTC/FCC consumer guidance has identified international callback and impostor scam complaint patterns involving some Caribbean NANP area codes.
Public FTC/FCC consumer guidance has identified sweepstakes, impostor, and callback scam complaint patterns involving this region.

country_codes.basis: Public FTC complaint pattern summaries frequently cite international advance-fee, romance, and impostor scam reports associated with this country code.
Public FTC/FCC complaint pattern summaries frequently cite overseas call-center impostor scam reports associated with this country code.
